name: Cyber Archfiend
desc: At the beginning of your Draw Phase, if you have no cards in your hand, draw 1 more card in addition to your normal draw. During your End Phase, if you have 1 or more card(s) in your hand, destroy this card.
mnst_eff: At the beginning of your Draw Phase, if you have no cards in your hand, draw 1 more card in addition to your normal draw. During your End Phase, if you have 1 or more card(s) in your hand, destroy this card.
eff: At the beginning of your Draw Phase, if you have no cards in your hand, draw 1 more card in addition to your normal draw. During your End Phase, if you have 1 or more card(s) in your hand, destroy this card.

misc: Requires having no cards in hand
